untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental metrics (Price-to-Book ratio, Price-to-Earnings ratio, earnings release scheduling, 3-year return ranking) and event-based timing (earnings release windows) that are not available in the allowed technical indicator list. These require external data sources (company financials, earnings calendar) beyond OHLCV and standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using technical proxies: weak 3-year performer approximated as negative returns; value stock screening would require P/B and P/E ratios not available; earnings event timing requires external event calendar data. The behavioral reversal signal cannot be reliably captured with technical indicators alone. This signal fundamentally requires a multi-asset fundamental data feed and event calendar integration.
